title: USA sectoral shift fact of the day
subtitle: Healthcare and Social Assistance have added nearly 1.8 million private-sector jobs in the US since the end of 2023 while all of other industries combined have lost 127,800 jobs. Here is the source (Charlie Bilello) and a graph. In relative terms, is this good or bad for men? The post USA sectoral shift fact of the day appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION .
contentHtml:
Healthcare and Social Assistance have added nearly 1.8 million private-sector jobs in the US since the end of 2023 while all of other industries combined have lost 127,800 jobs.

Here is the source (Charlie Bilello) and a graph.  In relative terms, is this good or bad for men?

The post USA sectoral shift fact of the day appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION.
